pillars.title: Original tooling, not imitations.
pillars.body: Our Duplex burners are pressed on the same original Birmingham dies used over a century ago. We own the moulds and tooling for everything we manufacture. When we say original, we mean the actual equipment — not a copy of it.

pillars.title: Old world materials, period correct.
pillars.body: Our shades and chimneys are produced in borosilicate glass to the same specification as the originals. Our brass alloy has not been reformulated for cost. The wicking is manufactured to the original Duplex weight — not a modern substitute.

pillars.title: Honesty over marketing.
pillars.body: Our invoices are plain paper. Our phone rings to a person. Our returns policy fits in one sentence: if it arrives less than whole, send it back, on us, for thirty days.
